title: Senior Financial Analyst - CCAvenue - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CCAvenue - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!
